name: context-os
description: Context optimization layer for Claude Code. Static-analysis RAG via UserPromptSubmit hook — Claude's first turn starts with file:line candidates from a pre-built repo graph (no embeddings, no server). Live `claude --print` A/B on 36 real calls: −40.9% aggregate tokens [CI 32.7%, 48.9%], 6/6 wins, p=5e-7, Cohen's d=1.84. Offline MRR 0.969 across Python/TS/Rust (+0.094 over BM25-symbols). Dogfood on this repo: MRR 0.789, top-1 0.667 — beats all 5 lexical baselines (+0.181 MRR over BM25-symbols). v2.7 path_df precomputation: p99 hook latency 118ms at 10k files, 589ms at 50k files (1.7× under SLA). CI-enforced ranker regression gate (9 hard floors). 18/18 robustness cases. Eleven slash commands, six Python hooks. 28 techniques, one installer.
